nodes.title: User Registration with Email Verification
nodes.summary: New users must register an account and verify their email address to securely access the platform.

nodes.title: Profile Creation with Photo and Bio
nodes.summary: As a registered user, I need to create a profile with a photo (JPEG/PNG, up to 2 MB) and a biography (up to 500 characters) from the account settings page to personalize my account and share information about myself.

nodes.title: Text Post Creation with Image Upload
nodes.summary: A user must be able to create a post with text and optional images, which will then be saved and shared with other users.

nodes.title: Post Like/Unlike with Count Display
nodes.summary: Users need a like/unlike button on posts that immediately updates the total like count and toggles between liked and unliked states to enable content engagement and display popularity.

nodes.title: Flat Comment Creation and Management
nodes.summary: Auser can add, edit, and delete flat comments on posts to engage with content and control their contributions.

nodes.title: Chronological News Feed from Friends
nodes.summary: A user wants to view a news feed displaying posts from their friends in chronological order (newest first) to stay updated on recent activities.

nodes.title: Friend Request Send and Accept/Reject
nodes.summary: A user can send friend requests to others, and accept or reject incoming requests, with notifications sent, to build a network of mutual friendships.

nodes.title: Follow/Unfollow Users with Counts
nodes.summary: The user needs a feature to follow or unfollow other users and view follower/following counts on profiles to manage connections and assess social influence.

nodes.title: Group Creation with Public/Private Flag
nodes.summary: Users need the ability to create groups with public or private visibility settings to control who can view or join them, with public groups being open to all and private groups requiring approval or invitation.

nodes.title: Private Group Join Request Approval
nodes.summary: Group owners or admins need the ability to review and approve or reject pending join requests for private groups to control membership.

nodes.title: Group-Specific Feed Display
nodes.summary: A group member wants to see a feed of posts only from their own groups, ensuring they stay updated without unrelated content.

nodes.title: One-on-One Direct Messaging
nodes.summary: The user requires a private messaging feature to send and receive direct, instant, and confidential one-on-one messages with other users, including message history access.

nodes.title: Notifications for Likes and Comments
nodes.summary: The user needs to receive notifications when someone likes or comments on their post, but not for other interactions, and they can disable notifications for specific posts.

nodes.title: Keyword Search Across Users and Posts
nodes.summary: The user needs a keyword search feature that returns both matching users and posts in a combined results list.

nodes.title: Bookmark Posts to Saved List
nodes.summary: The user requires a bookmarking feature to save posts and access them later from a dedicated saved list.

nodes.title: Report Post with Reason Dropdown
nodes.summary: A logged-in user can report a post by selecting a reason from a dropdown menu, which flags the post for review and shows a confirmation message.

nodes.title: Admin Panel for Reported Content
nodes.summary: An admin requires a panel to review reported content and take actions such as warn, hide, or delete to effectively moderate content.

nodes.title: Profile Privacy Public/Private Toggle
nodes.summary: The user needs a feature to toggle their profile visibility between public and private, allowing them to control who can view their profile at any time.

nodes.title: Block User to Hide Content and Messages
nodes.summary: A user can block another user to hide their existing and future posts and messages, with no notification to the blocked user and the option to undo the block later.

nodes.title: Notification Preference Toggles per Category
nodes.summary: Users can enable or disable notifications per category (e.g., likes, comments, friend requests) via toggles in their settings, with changes taking effect immediately.

nodes.title: Admin Verified Badge Grant/Revoke
nodes.summary: Admins can grant or revoke verified badges on user profiles to manage user credibility and verification status.

nodes.title: User Post History and Account Settings
nodes.summary: User needs to view their post history and manage account settings (change password, email, delete account) to control their account and review their posts.

nodes.title: Pagination on Feeds and Search Results
nodes.summary: The user requires paginated results when browsing feeds or search results to avoid long loading times, with only the first page loaded initially and navigation controls for further pages.

nodes.title: Account Soft-Deletion with Deleted Flag
nodes.summary: A user requests to soft-delete their account so that the account is marked as deleted but their data is preserved for a grace period, allowing potential recovery.

nodes.title: Admin Role Enforcement with Action Logging
nodes.summary: Admins require all actions like banning and warning to be logged persistently for audit review, including details like admin ID, action type, timestamp, and target user.

nodes.title: Implement paginated results for feeds and search results
User can create a text post and optionally upload images
User receives notification on post interactions
Admin can grant verified badges on user profiles
User must be able to block another user to hide their posts and messages
User can send and receive private messages
User can like and unlike a post
User should be able to bookmark posts and view them later
User should be able to report a post by selecting a reason from a dropdown menu
Add, edit, and delete comments on posts
Display News Feed Sorted by Time
